name: unity-video-multimodal-generation
description: Unified multi-modal multi-task learning for enhanced world-aware video generation
content:
## UnityVideo: Unified Multi-Modal Learning

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.07831 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.07831

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
